scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.test:web: node --test --import tsx web/test/chat-workflow.test.ts web/test/markdown-message.test.ts web/test/matrix-gates.test.ts web/test/matrix-api.test.ts web/test/diagnostics-api.test.ts web/test/workspace-state.test.ts web/test/shell-view-model.test.ts web/test/approval-primitives.test.ts web/test/github-workspace.test.ts web/test/matrix-workspace.test.ts web/test/review-workspace.test.ts web/test/settings-workspace.test.ts web/test/browser-upstream-boundary.test.ts web/test/localization.test.ts web/test/app-localization.test.ts web/test/pwa.test.ts
scripts.perf:bundle:web: npm run build --workspace web && node scripts/check-web-bundle-budget.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:web
